holdings.infoBox: RUSC is an equity ETF with a total of 491 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 1.02%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.70%, PDF Solutions at 0.62%, Vishay Intertechnology at 0.60%, and DigitalOcean Holdings at 0.60%.

overview.description: The Russell Investments U.S. Small Cap Equity ETF (RUSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in US small-cap companies. Security selection is based on a multi-style and multi-manager approach RUSC was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Russell Investments.
